cards.name: Doran, the Fallen Tower
cards.reason: Makes toughness deal damage and punishes the opponent's small creatures; a true wall of death

cards.name: Bitterblossom Reborn
cards.reason: Infinite 1/1 flyers; in a tribal set, this provides endless fodder and pressure

cards.name: Mistbind Marauder
cards.reason: Flash flyer that can skip the opponent's upkeep; a massive tempo blowout

cards.name: Wilt-Leaf Avenger
cards.reason: Elite Kithkin lord that protects your board and hits like a truck

cards.name: Ashling the Extinguisher
cards.reason: Repeatable removal on an efficient body; must be answered immediately

cards.name: Sygg, River Cutthroat
cards.reason: Unbeatable card draw engine in a set filled with chip damage and Wither

cards.name: Cinderspit Shot
cards.reason: Premium removal that leaves -1/-1 counters; shuts down persist creatures

cards.name: Mulldrifter
cards.reason: The king of card advantage; can be evoked early or played late for a 2-for-1

cards.name: Nameless Inversion
cards.reason: Universal tribal removal; triggers every tribal synergy in the set

cards.name: Silvergill Drowner
cards.reason: Replaces itself and provides a body; essential for Merfolk tapping decks

cards.name: Goldmeadow Bodyguard
cards.reason: Cheap protection that keeps your tribal lords alive

cards.name: Cloudgoat Ranger
cards.reason: Provides 4 bodies in one card; the ultimate Kithkin go-wide enabler

tiers.label: Good Playables
tiers.description: Solid cards that make every deck better

cards.name: Inkfathom Infiltrator
cards.reason: Unblockable threat that enables 'damage dealt' triggers consistently

cards.name: Gilt-Leaf Ambush
cards.reason: Instant speed blockers that can trade up and provide Elf tribal value

cards.name: Tarfire
cards.reason: Shock with Goblin tribal typing; counts for kinship and recursion

cards.name: Boggart Shenanigans
cards.reason: Great payoff for the BR Goblin sacrifice strategy

cards.name: Wizened Cenn
cards.reason: Cheap lord that makes your Kithkin army difficult to block

cards.name: Peppersmoke
cards.reason: Efficient trick that draws a card if you control a Faerie

cards.name: Moonglove Extract
cards.reason: Colorless removal; useful but slightly overcosted

cards.name: Kinsbaile Skirmisher
cards.reason: Standard aggro filler for go-wide decks

cards.name: Fertilid
cards.reason: Slow ramp but provides fixing for splashing bombs

cards.name: Lignify
cards.reason: Green removal that turns bombs into trees; can backfire against Treefolk decks

tiers.label: Sideboard / Avoid
tiers.description: Only play if desperate or as sideboard cards

cards.name: Guttural Response
cards.reason: Strictly a sideboard card against blue control decks

cards.name: Gloomwidow
cards.reason: Too narrow; can only block creatures with flying

tiers.label: Unplayable
tiers.description: Never put these in your deck

cards.name: Eclipsed Sun
cards.reason: Provides minimal value for its mana cost; avoid at all costs
